# Revital Daycare
> Quality childcare and early childhood education in Winnetka, CA. Serving infants (6 weeks+), toddlers, and preschoolers with play-based, nurturing care.

## About
- [About Us](https://revitaldaycare.com/about.html): Our story, mission, team, and facility in Winnetka, CA
- [Programs](https://revitaldaycare.com/programs.html): Infant care, toddler program, and preschool details
- [Gallery](https://revitaldaycare.com/gallery.html): Photos of our classrooms, activities, and special moments
- [Contact](https://revitaldaycare.com/contact.html): Schedule a tour, FAQ, and contact information

## Key Facts
- Location: 20628 Londelius St, Winnetka, CA 91306
- Phone: (818) 943-5983
- Email: revitaldaycare@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 6:30 AM - 6:00 PM
- Founded by Revital Edry
- Ages served: 6 weeks through 5 years
- Teacher: Revital Edry
- Assistant: Itamar Nadjar
- Ratios: 3:1 infants, 4:1 toddlers, 6:1 preschoolers
- Full-time and part-time enrollment available
- Play-based, child-centered approach inspired by Reggio Emilia principles
- Licensed by California Department of Social Services
- All staff CPR/First Aid certified and background-checked
